ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the author */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author's account was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the author */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the author */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author's account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the author logged into the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "author_id" TEXT /* ID of the author who posted the content */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the post was published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was published */,
  "harvested_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was harvested (recorded in the database) */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the author is following */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the author has */,
  "updates" INTEGER /* Number of updates to the author's account */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been retweeted */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign associated with the post */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on various metrics */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been seen */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the post (e.g., scheduled, published, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_post_type FOREIGN KEY ("post_type") REFERENCES post_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  "native_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of native speakers of the language */,
  "script" TEXT /* Writing script used for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_types" (
  "type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each post type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the post type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the post type */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media associated with the post type */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals of the campaign */,
  "actual_spent" REAL /* Actual amount spent on the campaign */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)
